title: Pyrite Turtle Pendant – Crystal Infused Gold-Tone Necklace
short_description: A dainty gold-tone turtle pendant with a glossy black enamel shell and sparkling crystal flippers, infused with genuine Pyrite — the crystal of abundance and success. Comes on a matching gold-tone chain, ready to gift.
body_html:
Meet the Pyrite Turtle Pendant — a little symbol of good fortune you can wear every day. The turtle has always stood for patience, longevity and steady progress, and here it is finished in warm 18K gold-tone plating with a hand-set glossy black enamel shell and tiny faceted crystals sparkling across its flippers. It is the kind of piece people stop to ask you about.

What makes it truly special is the genuine Pyrite crystal woven into its story. Long loved as the stone of abundance and success, Pyrite is believed to draw prosperity, confidence and fresh opportunity to the one who carries it. Wear your turtle as a quiet daily reminder that good things are on their way.

  • Crystal Infused: carries the energy of real Pyrite — the abundance & success stone.
  • Premium finish: rich 18K gold-tone plating with a smooth, skin-friendly feel.
  • Statement detail: deep black enamel shell offset by bright crystal-set flippers and crystal eyes.
  • Ready to wear: arrives on a matching gold-tone chain, beautifully boxed.
  • Lightweight: petite and comfortable for all-day, everyday wear.

Whether you are treating yourself or searching for a meaningful gift for someone you love, this turtle carries a message that never goes out of style — keep going, good fortune is following you.
seo_title: Pyrite Turtle Pendant – Crystal Infused Gold Necklace
seo_description: Gold-tone turtle pendant infused with genuine Pyrite crystal for abundance & success. Glossy black enamel shell, sparkling crystals. Ships in 24 hrs. Only 699.

metafields.highlights: Crystal-infused Pyrite turtle pendant · Premium 18K gold-tone plating · Glossy black enamel shell with sparkling crystal-set flippers · Symbol of abundance & success · Lightweight, skin-friendly finish · Arrives on a matching gold-tone chain, gift-boxed
metafields.material_or_ingredients: Gold-tone plated alloy body (18K gold colour) · Glossy black enamel shell · Faceted clear crystal accents on flippers · Black crystal eyes · Genuine Pyrite crystal energy · Matching gold-tone chain
metafields.care_or_directions: Keep away from water, perfume, sweat and harsh chemicals. Wipe gently with a soft dry cloth after wear. Store in the pouch/box provided when not in use to keep the gold-tone shine long-lasting. Avoid pulling on the shell or bail.
metafields.shipping: Ships in 24 hrs · COD available · Free shipping over ₹499

faqs.q: What is Pyrite and why is it in this pendant?
faqs.a: Pyrite is a natural crystal long loved as the stone of abundance and success. It is believed to attract prosperity, confidence and new opportunities — making this turtle a meaningful lucky charm to carry with you every day.

faqs.q: Will the gold-tone finish fade or tarnish?
faqs.a: The pendant has a premium 18K gold-tone plated finish. With simple care — keeping it away from water, perfume and sweat and wiping it with a soft dry cloth — the shine stays bright for a long time.

faqs.q: Does it come with a chain?
faqs.a: Yes. Your Pyrite Turtle Pendant arrives on a matching gold-tone chain, ready to wear straight out of the box.

faqs.q: Is it comfortable for daily wear?
faqs.a: Absolutely. It is petite, lightweight and has a smooth, skin-friendly finish, so it sits comfortably at the collarbone through the day.

faqs.q: Does it make a good gift?
faqs.a: It is one of our favourite gifts. The turtle symbolises longevity and steady good fortune, and the Pyrite adds a wish for abundance and success — beautifully boxed for birthdays, anniversaries or just because.

On the right, a large circular macro zoom inset showing the Pyrite druzy crystal in detail (grey druzy sparkling with golden pyrite flecks in a gold bezel, matching the crystal reference), connected to the pendant by a dotted line, with a grey pill label 'PYRITE CRYSTAL' and a rose benefit line 'Abundance and success' beneath it. Scatter a few raw pyrite nuggets as props. Vibrant, saturated, high-contrast light, scroll-stopping premium brand style.
